summary: Backend-only testing of TARS AI assistant function calling features. All 8 tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) TARS lists user events, 2) TARS views event itinerary, 3) TARS adds activity to existing event (Viagem NYC), 4) Activity persisted in database, 5) TARS creates new habit. The P0 bug fix using MongoDB array_filters is working correctly.

tars_lists_user_events.details: TARS correctly lists user events (Viagem NYC, Aniversário, UFC, etc.) when asked

tars_views_event_itinerary.details: TARS uses get_event_itinerary function to show NYC trip itinerary with activities

tars_adds_activity_to_itinerary.details: TARS successfully added 'Visita ao MoMA' at 15:00 on 2026-04-19 to Viagem NYC

activity_persisted_in_database.details: MoMA activity verified in database with correct date, time, title and notes

tars_creates_new_habit.details: TARS created TEST_Meditação habit with 🧘 emoji and daily frequency

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB array_filters fix in add_to_itinerary is correct and working
Fallback to index-based update provides resilience if array_filters fails
User data access correctly uses user_doc.get('data', {}).get('events', [])
Function calling tools are well-defined with proper parameter schemas
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Meditação habit and added MoMA activity to Viagem NYC itinerary
context_for_next_testing_agent: TARS AI function calling is fully working. The P0 bug fix using array_filters for MongoDB nested array updates is verified. Test data created: TEST_Meditação habit and MoMA activity on 2026-04-19 in Viagem NYC event.

nyc_itinerary.notes: Endereço: 11 W 53rd St, New York, NY 10019, EUA
